title: Xore
description: Texture Pack for people that get distracted easily
body:
# XORE

Xore adds a bold border around each block and item that are easily missed, it helps draw attention to important elements of the game world.

The border is a vibrant blue color, providing a clear contrast against the various textures in Minecraft. Additionally, the border makes it more noticeable from a distance. 

Overall, the Xore texture pack **is a great choice for players who want to improve their awareness of the game world**.

![mod](https://i.imgur.com/4IxXBP2.png)

**Note**: __This is NOT an XRAY Texture Pack! this only add a border to Items that you can see__.
